app.title: Show HN: Large Scale Article Extract of Newspapers 1730s-1960s
app.author: brettnbutter
app.description: Extract large scale articles from newspapers 1730s-1960s
proposed_tests: Visit the tool URL and test extracting a sample article
Compare performance of the tool vs manual extraction methods
Test the tool's ability to extract complex article layouts
